mapper.sql: pec.employee_id as pe_id, pec.contract_type, pec.start_time, pec.end_time, pec.contract_validity, pec.new_contract_flag, pec.remarks, pec.attribute1, pec.attribute2, pec.attribute3, pec.enabled_flag, pec.id, pec.create_time, pec.create_by, pec.update_time, pec.update_by, pec.quantity

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.contract_type as ${tAlias}_contract_type, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.contract_validity as ${tAlias}_contract_validity, ${tAlias}.new_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_new_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
,
, ISNULL(pe_peen.id, -1) pe_peen_id,
,fdev.ext_dept_name AS pe_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS pe_department, fdev.ext_team_name AS pe_team from (select * from (select *, count(*) over(partition by employee_id) quantity, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by employee_id order by start_time desc) rn from pm_employee_contract ) aa where aa.rn = 1) pec join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pec.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join pm_employee_job pe_pej on pe.id = pe_pej.employee_id and pe_pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe_pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pe_pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 outer apply ( select top(1) peen_ap.* from pm_employee_entry peen_ap where peen_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peen_ap.enabled_flag = 1 ) pe_peen
mapper.select: select count(*) from pm_employee_contract pec join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pec.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 where 1 = 1
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_contract (employee_id, contract_type, start_time, end_time, contract_validity, new_contract_flag, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{contractValidity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_contract set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, contract_type = #{contractType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, contract_validity = #{contractValidity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_contract_flag = #{newContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pec.employee_id as pe_id, pec.contract_type, pec.start_time, pec.end_time, pec.contract_validity, pec.new_contract_flag, pec.remarks, pec.attribute1, pec.attribute2, pec.attribute3, pec.enabled_flag, pec.id, pec.create_time, pec.create_by, pec.update_time, pec.update_by from pm_employee_contract pec where pec.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select pec.employee_id as pe_id, pec.contract_type, pec.start_time, pec.end_time, pec.contract_validity, pec.new_contract_flag, pec.remarks, pec.attribute1, pec.attribute2, pec.attribute3, pec.enabled_flag, pec.id, pec.create_time, pec.create_by, pec.update_time, pec.update_by from pm_employee_contract pec where pec.employee_Id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and pec.enabled_flag = 1 order by pec.start_time desc

select pec.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pec.contract_type) > 0 then pec.contract_type else null end as contract_type, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pec.contract_validity) > 0 then pec.contract_validity else null end as contract_validity, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pec.remarks) > 0 then pec.remarks else null end as remarks from pm_employee_contract pec join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pec.employee_id where pec.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pec.contract_type,pec.contract_validity,pec.remarks ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
select top 1 pec.* from pm_employee_contract pec where pec.enabled_flag = 1 and pec.new_contract_flag = 1 and pec.employee_id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
